title: Create billing app with invoice generation, download, and multi-currency support

requirements.text: Create a backend data model for invoices that stores: unique invoice ID, invoice number, date, customer details (name, email, address), line items (description, quantity, unit price), subtotal, tax rate, tax amount, total amount, currency code (USD, INR, etc.), and status (draft, finalized)

quotes: Make a billing app where anyone can make bill for anything

acceptanceCriteria: Invoice model includes all required fields
Currency is stored as a string code (e.g., 'USD', 'INR')
Line items support multiple entries per invoice
Invoice can be persisted and retrieved by ID

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to create new invoices, retrieve invoices by ID, list all invoices, update invoice details, and delete invoices

quotes: Make a billing app where anyone can make bill for anything

acceptanceCriteria: Create method accepts invoice data and returns the created invoice with ID
Retrieve method returns invoice details for a given ID
List method returns all invoices
Update method modifies existing invoice fields
Delete method removes invoice from storage

requirements.text: Create a frontend form that allows users to input customer information (name, email, address), add multiple line items (description, quantity, unit price), select currency from a dropdown (at minimum USD and INR), specify tax rate, and calculate totals automatically

quotes: Make a billing app where anyone can make bill for anything
make currency in different options ex. Usd, inr etc

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes fields for customer name, email, and address
Users can add/remove line items dynamically
Currency dropdown includes at least USD and INR
Subtotal, tax amount, and total are calculated automatically as user inputs data
Form validates required fields before submission

requirements.text: Display a formatted invoice preview that shows all invoice details including company/sender information, customer information, line items table, subtotal, tax, and total with the selected currency symbol

quotes: Make a billing app where anyone can make bill for anything

acceptanceCriteria: Invoice preview renders in a professional, printable layout
Currency symbol displays correctly based on selected currency (e.g., $ for USD, ₹ for INR)
All invoice data is clearly visible and formatted
Preview updates when invoice data changes

requirements.text: Implement download functionality that allows users to download the invoice as a PDF file

quotes: download or send it to another platform

acceptanceCriteria: Download button generates a PDF of the current invoice
PDF includes all invoice details in a professional format
Downloaded file is named appropriately (e.g., 'Invoice-[number].pdf')
PDF preserves formatting and currency symbols

requirements.text: Implement share/send functionality that allows users to share the invoice via common platforms or methods (e.g., copy shareable link, download for email attachment)
acceptanceCriteria: Users can generate a shareable link to view the invoice
Share button provides options for common sharing methods
Shared invoices are accessible without authentication
Share functionality works across different devices

requirements.text: Create a dashboard page that lists all created invoices with key details (invoice number, customer name, date, total amount with currency, status) and allows users to view, edit, or delete each invoice

quotes: Make a billing app where anyone can make bill for anything

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays all invoices in a table or card layout
Each invoice shows invoice number, customer name, date, amount with currency symbol, and status
Users can click to view full invoice details
Edit and delete actions are available for each invoice
Dashboard updates in real-time when invoices are created, edited, or deleted

requirements.text: Apply a creative, professional visual design theme suitable for a business invoicing application with a consistent color palette, typography, and layout that conveys trust and professionalism
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme avoids default blue/purple and uses professional business colors
Typography is clear and readable for business documents
Layout is clean and organized with proper spacing
Design conveys professionalism and trustworthiness
Visual style is applied consistently across all pages

constraints: Must support at minimum USD and INR currencies
Invoice calculations must be accurate for financial data
PDF generation must work client-side without external services
nonGoals: Payment processing or payment gateway integration
Multi-user accounts or user authentication beyond Internet Identity
